programme.title: Inside Edition
programme.desc: Security concerns rise across the United States after the White House Correspondents' Dinner.

programme.title: Entertainment Tonight
programme.desc: The Film Society of Lincoln Center honors George Clooney at the Chaplin Award Gala; Ginger Zee sits down with her mother, who graduated from medical school at 72; Heidi Montag prepares for her third album, "Masterpiece.".

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team races to help one of their own who has been framed for murder and caught in a widening conspiracy that could compromise national security.

programme.title: NCIS: Origins
programme.desc: Wheeler takes command when a car bomb goes off outside NIS headquarters; the truth about Franks' distaste for lawyers is revealed.

programme.title: NCIS: Sydney
programme.desc: When a high-tech military drone kills a teenage girl, the team investigates whether the murderer is man -- or machine.

programme.sub-title: Blood, Booze and Birthdays; Emergency Brake Bash!
programme.desc: A woman sues her friends for damaging her apartment after a drunken night out for her birthday; a woman blames her boyfriend, with whom she was on the phone when she crashed her car.

programme.sub-title: Dog Poisoning?!; Mom Not a Fan of My Wife!
programme.desc: A tenant accuses his landlord of poisoning his dogs; a mother-in-law demands repayment of money lent for a divorce attorney when her son reunites with his wife.

programme.desc: Victor forces Michael's hand; Jack reveals a new plan of attack; Cricket threatens Phyllis; Patty pushes Kyle's buttons.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful
programme.desc: Set in the glamorous world of the Los Angeles fashion scene, this soap opera focuses on the wealthy and powerful Forrester family; its company, Forrester Creations, is the leader in the fashion industry.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Chelsea and Anita confront Leslie; Shanice is hurt to see Ted in a close moment with his ex; Madison gets sidelined at work; Smitty uses his father-in-law as a resource; Tyrell and Jessica discuss the future of their relationship.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Kate Hudson joins Drew to chat about Season 2 of "Running Point" with co-star Justin Theroux.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli and Drew chat with Wolfgang Van Halen and his wife Andraia about his new music, plus a performance from his band!

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Truck Surrender?!; Bad Luck Police Bump!
programme.desc: A young man buys a friend's truck for $200, but once it is in running condition, his friend wants him to pay the value of the vehicle; a woman sues her son for damages after he has a crash while driving her car.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A tenant accuses a landlord of breaking into her room and stealing her possessions; he says she left and skipped out on the rent.

programme.desc: When new pressures threaten Sam and Jay's control over Woodstone, they're forced to navigate unexpected challenges to protect its future; a long-absent ghost returns, reopening emotional connections that complicate new relationships.
